titleStmt.title: SII 11.152: original edition by N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 152. (B.K. No. 114 of 1926-27.) HOSŪR, GADAG TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT. ON TWO SLABS BUILT INTO THE WALL OF THE TRIKŪṬĒŚVARA TEMPLE.

summary.p: This record refers itself to the reign of Tribhuvanamalladēva (Vikramāditya VI) and is dated Chāḷukya-Vikrama year 27, Chitrabhānu, Māgha, śu. 11, Thursday, sankramaṇa. The date does not seem to be regular. If, however, śu. 11 is a mistake for śu. 13, the equivalent would be A.D. 1103, January 22, Thursday; but the saṅkramaṇa (Kuṁbha) occurred on the following day. This inscription registers the grant of some plots of land by Mahāprabhu Nāki-Gāvuṇḍa, who was administering Posavūru as ēkabhōga, for worship and offerings in the temple of Morakēśvara constructed by him. The donor whose genealogy is given, is stated to have belonged to the Mōraka-kula. The gift was made after washing the feet of the teacher Jñānaśakti, while Sakaḷaprakāśa-Bhaṭṭāraka was governing the Perggēri of Muḷgunda and Posavūru. Posavūru is stated to to have been situated in Muḷugunda Twelve, a sub-division of Beḷvala-nāḍu and to have been the property of the god Vīranārāyaṇadēva evidently at Muḷugunda. (See B.K. No. 88 of 1926-27 below.) Other gifts to the same temple by the Ugara Three-Hundred and the One-Hundred are also recorded.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
jayaṁti pārvvatīnāthapādapaṁkajapāṁsavaḥ jagatkarturudādhānakāraṇāṁtaduraṁdharāḥ . namaḥ śivāya .
Arṇnavavēṣṭitākhiḷadharātaḷamadhyadoḷabjamadhyadoḷkarṇnike yippavō lsogayisirppudu mēru tadadri
viḷāsamaṁ taḷeda bhāratavarṣadoḷoppi tōrppu dākīrṇnasamastavastuvene kuṁtaḷadēśavu dāttasaṁpada . svasti samastabhuvanāśraya śrīprithvīvallabha mahārājā
dhirāja paramēśvara paramabhaṭṭāraka satyāśrayakuḷatiḷaka cāḷukyābharaṇa śrīmattribhuvana malladēva vijayarājya muttarōttarābhivṛddhi pravarddhamāna mācaṁdrā
rkkatāraṁ saluttamire . Ā kuṁtaḷadēśado ḷabyākuḷa manavadyavakhiḷa śōbhāspadavāḷōkipa janake sakaḷasukhākaravena biḷvalaṁ karaṁ sogayisuguṁ . v® . Alli viḷāsinījanada
purvvinoḷallade vakrabhāva villelliyuvā mṛgākṣiyara kaṇgaḷoḷallade lōlavṛttiyillelliyu vā latāṁgiyara yānadoḷallade jāḍyameṁbu dillelliyu veṁdaḍārppogaḷarā viṣayāṁ
taramaṁ niraṁtaraṁ . Āṟaḍiyuṁ jinuṁguvaḷimāḷeyo ḷuddhatavṛtti yurvva ṟuvanaṁga noḷjaḍipamuṁ �ḍupuṁ bhṛguviddeyoḷa vuduṁ puruḷgoḷipuduṁ ga
ṇikāḷiyolalladelliyuṁ tōṟidudilla tadviṣayadoḷjaṟubēṁ bagedeṁtu nōḷpaḍaṁ . vidaḷitapadmavillada sarōvaravunmada caṁcarīkavillada sarasije mattapikavillada naṁdana vūḷva kīravillada
sahakāravujjaḷipa gojjageyillada puṣpavāṭiyillade baṟidirddudoṁdeḍeyuvilla tadurvvi yoḷeṁtu nōḷpaḍaṁ . va . Iṁtu negaḷtevettu pogaḷtegāvāsamuṁ dharmmakke nivāsamu
māda beḷvala nāḍoḷagaṇa muḷuguṁda hanneraḍaṟa baḷiya bāḍa . v® . baḷasida pūgoḷaṁ koḷadoḷoḷtalarddaṁbuja vaṁbujakke pāyvaḷi yaḷigīti gaḷki sugidirppa viyōgi
nōḍi seṁcaḷise maraldaralda posamallige mallige gāḍhagaṁdhamaṁ baḷasi teraḷci tīḍuvelariṁ posavūresaguṁ niraṁtaraṁ . Eḷedaḷirvvēṟidāṁbrataru keṁdaḷirddoṁgala nāntaśōke kāygaḷa hoṟevottataṁ
galardda mallige taḷte levaḷḷi paṇtu taṇmaleva mayiṁdavāḷe nanevottadirmmutte beḍaṁganāvagaṁ taḷedire tatpurōpavana vēnesedirppudo nōḍe nāḍeyuṁ . Antumalladeyuṁ . Adu suraśailadante
vibudhāśraya vaṁbudhiyaṁte bāḍavāspada vahirājabhūṣaṇasabhāṁtaradaṁte vṛṣābhirāmamaṁbarataḷadaṁte saumyasuradhiṣṇya virājitaveṁdaḍeṁtu veydidapuvene
dāve puramuṁ negaḷdāpura duṁnatikeyaṁ . Adaṟoḷudāttapuṇyadhana naṁbarado ḷhimarōci mēruśaiḷado ḷamaradrumaṁ jaḷadhiyo ḷhari yirppavolirppa nūrjjitāspada nakhiḷā rttha
sārtthanidhi cārucaritra nupāttanityasaṁpadanene peṁpuvettu vibhuvaicagavuṁḍa napārapauruṣaṁ . Ā vibhuvina kulalalane mahīvaṁditapuṇye kaṁcigāvuṁḍi lasatpāvanacaritra sī tādēvi
ge patibhaktiyiṁ samānamenippaḷ . v® . Avargge tanūjarādarudāttayaśa rggirijātegaṁ manōbhavamathanaṁga vā gaṇapaṣaṇmukha rātmejarappavo lmahōtsavanirata rpparārtthacaritarvvibhu boppagavuṁḍanuṁ
jayārṇnavanena rūḍiyaṁ paḍeda nākigavuṁḍanu veṁba rirvvaruṁ . ka . Avarirvvaro ḷanupama guṇa navadātavinūtakīrtti nākigavuṇḍaṁ bhuvanastuta nātmakuḷārṇnavavarddhanacāru candranene negaḻdirddhaṁ .
va . Ā mahānubhāvana guṇaprabhāvameṁteṁdaḍe . v® . Ivanemmeṁmane kādaneṁma bharamaṁkaikoṇḍanemmeṁma bhāravanōraṁtire tāḻdidaṁ karuṇadiṁdemmaṁ yathānyāyadiṁ dave v®ttipratipattiyoḷni
lisidaṁ tāneṁdu saṁprītiyiṁ bhuvanaṁ baṇni sutirppudalte mudadindaṁ nākigāvuṇḍanaṁ . khaḷare ravaṁ kaḷalcidudu kaḷḷara koḷḷiya bādheyembegaḷdaḷaṟe taraḷcitū®didudu maṁneya ranneyamaṁ nirākuḷaṁ du
du bhītiyiṁ maṟegevaṁdavaraṁ naṟe kādudendaḍāraḷaviyo dhātriyoḷnegaḻda nākigavuṇḍane bāhuvikramaṁ . kuṟidaṟiyāgi bidda bhaṭarī bhaṭarokka karuḷgaḷiṁ karuḷgeṟapa khagāḷiyiṁ khaganikā
yada bāya karuḷge pāyva beṁtaṟiyarinēnagurvva noḷakoṇḍudo nākigavuṇḍanāṁtu taḷtiṟidarisainyamaṁ bedaṟe berccisi bāyviḍe koṁḍa koḷguḷa . Uṟadidirāgi tāgi biṟutōḍadarā
tigaḷilla niṁdu taḷtiṟidu bardduṁki pōda ripunāyakarillena śauryyadēḷgeyaṁ meṟedu jagakke taṁna bhujavikramavaccene sanda gaṇḍarārppaṟarivanaṁtenutte dhare nākigavuṇḍana nōtu kīrttikuṁ .
Intavāryyabhujavikramanuṁ parabaḷapraḷeyabhairavanu varātidāvapāvakanuṁ morakakuḷa sarōjinīrājahaṁsanuṁ vinayāvataṁsanuṁ vuddhatamallanuṁ jagakkenallanuṁ bhayalōbha varjji
tanuṁ saṁsārasāranuṁ vandijavamākaṁdanaṁdanavasantanu vatinirmmaḷasvāṁtanuṁ nikhiḷaguṇabharitanuṁ saddharmmaniratanu venisi tanna pesare pesarāgi posavūra nēkabhōgadināḻdu sukhasaṁkathāvi
nōdadiniḷdu . v® . Idu dharmām®tavāriyēri yidu dēvēṁdrāspadakkēṟalikkida niśrēṇi yidātmekīrttilateyaṁ vistārisalkendu māḍidaḍarppembinaveyde nirmmisidanalte nākigāvuṇḍanudghada
yaṁ śrīmorakēsvarāleyamanīśādrīṁdrasādriśyamaṁ . svasti samastapraśastisahitaṁ śrī matribhuvamalladēvara paramārādhyarappa sakaḷaprakāśabhaṭṭāraka rmmuḷguṁdada pe
rggēriyuma nā muḷuguṁdada paṁneraḍakkaṁ teleyāgirdda vīranārāyaṇadēvarggāḷuve posavūruma sukhadināḷuttire . svasti yamaniyamasvādhyāyadhyānadhāraṇamō
nānuṣṭhānajapasamādhiśīḷasaṁpaṁnaru vanēkatarkkaśāstrapārāvārapāragaruvappa muḷuguṁ dada nakarēśvaradēvarācāryyarappa śrīkaṁṭhapaṇḍitadēvara śiṣyarssāmavēdidēva
r . v® . śivadharmmāmbhōdhisaṁvarddhanatuhinakara rccārucāritramākandavasantarśabdavidyā prathitap®thulatāḷambana rnnityadānaykavinōdavyāpaka rttāvene negaḷdariḷācakrado
ḷkīrttilakṣmīdhava rātmōdyattapōgnigrasitamanasija rssāmavēdibratīṁdrar . tacchiṣyaṁ viśvalōkapraṇuta nakhiḷavidyāgamācāryyavaryyaṁ sacchīlōdagravajrasphuṭitavṛjina ku
tkīḷa najñānakāṁtāracchēdōpāyadakṣaṁ parahitanirataṁ tānenuttuṁ pogaḷguṁ svacchaṁda jñānaśaktibratiya nanudinaṁ satkavibrātavellaṁ . dhṛtavidyāprauḍhiyā ytujvaḷama
ṇimukuraṁ bhāratīdēvi gatyorjitadānabrātavā ytābharaṇa vamaḷakīrtyaṁganāṁgakke nalviṁ śrutanādaṁ viddeyiṁ kīrttiyi nenuta janaṁ rāgadiṁ jñānaśaktibratiyaṁ sauja
nyalakṣmīpatiya nanudinaṁ baṇnisuttirppudalte . manamaṁ durvyasanakke taṁdanudinaṁ dēvasvamaṁ tindu durjanaroḷāṇade saṁdu lōkadapavādakkāvagaṁ bandu durmmanadiṁ dūrisuti
rppa tāpasanikṛṣṭarjñānaśaktibratīṁdrana nēmpōlvare lōbhakarmmakalilavyālōla cittāśrayar . svasti śrīmaccāḷukyavikramakāla 27 neya citrabhānusaṁvatsa
rada māgha śuddha 11 bṛhaspativāra saṁkramaṇa vyatīpātadaṁdu sakaḷaprakāśabhaṭṭārakara maydunanappa narasiṁhanāyakanuṁ siṁdakuḷajaḷadhi saṁvarddhanasudhākaranappa hollarasanuṁ mukhya
rāge mahāprabhu nākigāvuṇḍaṁ mahānubhāvarappa jñānaśaktidēvara kālaṁ karcci kaidhāre yeṟedu śrīmorakēśvaradēvaraṁgabhōgakkaṁ khaṇḍasphuṭitajīrṇnōddhārakkaṁ sarvva namasyamuṁ sarvvabādhapari
hāramumāge biṭṭa tōṁṭa 1 Ā tōṁṭada sthaḷavādēvara muṁdaṇa dēvigeṟeyiṁdīśānya diśāvara tatsīmeya nālku dikkinoḷ liṁgada kallu mattaṁ gavuṇḍadōṁṭadiṁdaṁ mūḍalpūvinatōṁṭa 1 mattaṁ dēva
rupahārake muḷuguṁdada mallaharamāriya kōloḷsarvvanamaśyaṁ biṭṭa keymattar 2 Ā keyya sthaḷaṁ karuvageyyiṁ paḍuvalu muḷuguṁdada guṇadabēsvarada holada mēreyiṁ baḍagalu mattaṁ
mattamā dēvargge hejjuṁkada sabbadēvayyanāyakaruṁ dēvapayyanāyakaruṁ virddūroḷenitu tōṁṭavoḷavanitaṟoḷaṁ kūyloḷallaṁ nandādīvigage biṭṭa Ogase hāga 1 mattavā dēvara tōṁṭada hejjuṁkamu
ma sarvvanamasyamāge biṭṭaru mattamādēvarupahārakke mottakāṟa bammaṇaṁ mukhya māgi yugaramūnūrvvaru virddu Ēṇiyalondu paṇamaṁ biṭṭaru mattavā dēvarggeleya hēṟinalu vīsavondu
kāvaṇadarihadalāḷa bhāgavondu dēvara naṁdādīvigage gāṇadaleṇni soḷasige vondu matta vā dēvargge nūrvvaru virddokkala loṭṭiloḷirvvaḷa bhattamaṁ biṭṭaru ©
Digital edition of SII 11.152 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
